AggTrade is an all-in-one DeFi trading and portfolio platform built on Katana.
AggTrade lets users access spot trading, earning, perps trading, bridging, referrals, and account management from one interface.
AggTrade uses SushiSwap for spot swaps and liquidity-related trading flows.
AggTrade uses Yearn Finance for yield and vault-based earning opportunities.
AggTrade uses Morpho for lending and borrowing markets.
AggTrade uses Katana Perps for perpetual futures trading. Kuma is no longer part of the perps trading flow.
The perps section of AggTrade is powered by Katana Perps and is focused on giving users a smooth trading experience directly inside the AggTrade app.
AggTrade is designed to reduce the need for users to jump between multiple DeFi apps on Katana.
The goal of AggTrade is to become the main trading hub for Katana users.
AggTrade combines trading, earning, borrowing, lending, perps, bridging, and referrals into one DeFi interface.
The AggTrade account page gives users a clear overview of their DeFi activity across the platform.
The account page shows estimated balance, equity trend, recent transactions, token portfolio distribution, and platform TVL.
The estimated balance section shows the user's total balance across Katana and connected AggTrade vaults.
The equity trend chart helps users understand how their account value changes over time.
The recent transactions section shows the user's latest activity, including token movements and transfers.
The token portfolio section shows the user's asset distribution across tokens.
The platform TVL section shows how the user's funds are distributed across SushiSwap, Yearn Finance, Morpho deposits, and Morpho borrow positions.
AggTrade gives users account-level visibility across DeFi positions instead of forcing them to check each protocol separately.
AggTrade supports deposit, withdraw, and transfer actions from the account area.
AggTrade is currently in beta and is focused on building a unified DeFi experience for Katana.
AggTrade's core value proposition is simple: manage and trade across Katana DeFi from one place.
AggTrade is for users who want a cleaner way to interact with Katana DeFi without switching between Sushi, Yearn, Morpho, Katana Perps, and bridge interfaces.
AggTrade wants to make DeFi on Katana feel more like a complete trading app rather than a scattered set of protocols.
AggTrade's product direction is focused on usability, portfolio visibility, and unified access to Katana DeFi opportunities.
AggTrade's account dashboard is not just a wallet page. It is meant to become a full DeFi command center for Katana users.
AggTrade filler posts should educate users about unified DeFi, Katana trading, account visibility, perps, portfolio tracking, and simplified access to protocols.
AggTrade content should avoid mentioning Kuma as the current perps provider. The correct perps provider is Katana Perps.
AggTrade content can highlight that users can trade spot, earn yield, borrow, lend, trade perps, bridge, and track their portfolio in one app.
AggTrade content should sound sharp, product-focused, and useful, not generic motivational content.
AggTrade should position itself as the trading layer and portfolio hub for Katana DeFi.
